title: Harder to Breathe
lyric:
[00:00.00] 作词 : Siraparn Takviriyanan/Ng Xu Cun/Oh Youn Hwan/Verney Richard/Roson Rose/Tse Chi Man
[00:01.00] 作曲 : Siraparn Takviriyanan/Ng Xu Cun/Oh Youn Hwan/Verney Richard/Roson Rose/Tse Chi Man
[00:11.88]In an instant
[00:13.23]You closed the distance
[00:14.79]Had no resistance
[00:16.53]To the way you looked
[00:18.39]Inside of me
[00:20.58]You see the different pieces
[00:24.15]Of my existence
[00:25.71]And like a rhythm
[00:27.21]You dance in tandem
[00:28.92]Your touch is electricity
[00:33.36]Oh...
[00:35.07]When you knocked me to the ground
[00:38.22]Like a rush of wind and sound
[00:41.07]So many ways you got me now
[00:45.51]Got me now
[00:48.93]It's getting harder
[00:52.17]Getting harder to breathe
[00:54.60]When love gets stronger
[00:57.60]All of the littlest things
[01:00.69]No they don't  hit the same
[01:03.75]Got no one else  left to blame
[01:06.90]But  you
[01:10.65]Its getting harder to breathe  around you
[01:22.98]Its getting harder to breathe  around you
[01:41.49]Don't need a reason
[01:43.05]To just believe in
[01:44.61]That sometimes even
[01:46.32]Fairytales can be  reality
[01:50.25]And now I'm wide awake
[01:53.88]Alive
[01:57.12]Can't hide
[02:00.09]What I feel for you
[02:03.27]This growing  ache inside
[02:06.33]As it gets harder
[02:09.60]Getting harder to breathe
[02:12.00]When love gets stronger
[02:15.03]All of the littlest things
[02:18.12]No they don't  hit the same
[02:21.18]Got no one else  left to blame
[02:24.33]But  you
[02:28.05]Its getting harder to breathe  around you
[02:40.38]Its getting harder to breathe  around  you
[02:56.01]Its getting harder,
[02:59.10]Getting harder to breathe
sub_lyric:
[by:波罗猫与海鸥心]
[00:11.88]仅仅一瞬间
[00:13.23]你便拉近了距离
[00:14.79]我丝毫无法抵抗
[00:16.53]你的模样 令我心醉神迷
[00:18.39]在我内心深处
[00:20.58]你可以看到截然不同的我
[00:24.15]我的存在 碎落一地
[00:25.71]仿佛曼妙节奏
[00:27.21]你随着韵律跳舞
[00:28.92]你的触摸仿佛电击
[00:33.36]噢
[00:35.07]当你让我重重地倒在地上时
[00:38.22]仿佛一阵微风 携着声音拂过
[00:41.07]此刻你已将我彻底俘获
[00:45.51]我已经属于你
[00:48.93]当日子越来越艰辛
[00:52.17]呼吸也变得愈发困难
[00:54.60]当爱变得更强烈时
[00:57.60]所有的细微之处
[01:00.69]带给人的感觉 都不复以往
[01:03.75]你已经无人可以怪罪 唯有自我
[01:06.90]但你
[01:10.65]在你身旁 呼吸便会变得愈发困难
[01:22.98]在你身旁 呼吸便会变得愈发困难
[01:41.49]不需要任何理由
[01:43.05]只消坚定地相信
[01:44.61]甚至有些时候
[01:46.32]童话也可以照进现实
[01:50.25]现在的我 已经完全清醒
[01:53.88]如此鲜活
[01:57.12]无法隐藏
[02:00.09]我对你的七情六欲
[02:03.27]内心的伤痛愈发蔓延
[02:06.33]当日子越来越艰辛
[02:09.60]呼吸也变得愈发困难
[02:12.00]当爱变得更强烈时
[02:15.03]所有的细微之处
[02:18.12]带给人的感觉 都不复以往
[02:21.18]你已经无人可以怪罪 唯有自我
[02:24.33]但你
[02:28.05]在你身旁 呼吸便会变得愈发困难
[02:40.38]在你身旁 呼吸便会变得愈发困难
[02:56.01]变得愈发困难
[02:59.10]连呼吸 都变得愈发困难
